qa_pairs.question: What should I do if my position has changed but I already have an Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: If your position has changed, you should apply for a new role, which will have a new CCRI. To do so, log in with your existing account and visit the [https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/me/add_role apply for a new role] form.

qa_pairs.question: How do I apply for a new role if my position has changed?
qa_pairs.answer: To apply for a new role after a position change, you should log in with your existing account and visit the [https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/me/add_role apply for a new role] form.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I have forgotten my Alliance account password?
qa_pairs.answer: If you have forgotten your password, you may [https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/security/forgot reset it].

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I can no longer access the email address associated with my Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: If you can no longer access the email address you have on file, please email [mailto:accounts@tech.alliancecan.ca accounts@tech.alliancecan.ca] and the support team can update it for you.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the form to apply for a new role?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find the form to apply for a new role by logging in with your existing account and visiting [https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/me/add_role].

qa_pairs.question: What email address should I use to request an update to my account's email address?
qa_pairs.answer: You should email [mailto:accounts@tech.alliancecan.ca accounts@tech.alliancecan.ca] to request an update to your account's email address.

qa_pairs.question: Will my CCRI change if I apply for a new role due to a position change?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, when you apply for a new role due to a position change, that new role will have a new CCRI.
